818.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
818.description: The four remaining sewers battle it out for a place in the semi-final. They face three challenges, none of which permit a pattern for guidance. Some play it safe to reproduce simple dresses while others take ambitious risks, but who will be rewarded?

36845.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
36845.description: The show reaches its climax as the three finalists enter the sewing room for the very last time. The sewing experts must decide who will take the title of Britain's best amateur sewer as they set three tough `couture' themed challenges.
